q: She _______ in the middle of his speech.
There _______ be an accident at any time on this bridge.
The school _______, I could not get my certificate.
Children _______ volunteer for an hour a week to spend time with the elderly.
When I was ten years old, I _______ speak three languages.
It has been two weeks, but the team has still not _______ from its defeat.
People _______ stay indoors as a severe storm is expected this evening.
Last week it _______ (rain) heavily and my house was flooded with water.
The students with the help of their teacher _______ (create) a beautiful poster.
When I was a very young girl, _______ grocery shopping was considered a major outing for me.
The package _______ (arrive) at nine in the morning, the day after tomorrow.
I appreciate even _______ help given to me.
